name: RockaBowling VR
short_description: RockaBowling is a VR bowling game set to a classic rockabilly theme. Enjoy immersive visuals and solid gameplay as your ears are filled with classic sounds of rock.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Rockabowling VR, a virtual bowling alley inspired by classic american rockabilly.

  • Immerse yourself in the mid 20th century atmosphere as you chuck balls down the lane.
  • Enjoy a couple of sets of 10-pin bowling for yourself.
  • Or with a friend in our hot-seat multiplayer, perfect for small gatherings.
  • Twist and curve your throws by tilting your controller. Good to have for those tricky splits.
  • The spectator camera shows your awesome skills on the monitor to your friends.
  • Try to beat a series of alternative pin layouts in the challenge mode,
  • Get feedback directly through the PA system by the site owner.
  • Leave your mark on the scoreboard with the top-10 local scores.
  • Let the achievements speak volumes about your performance.

reviews.review_text: Honestly, i expected a half-baked """""bowling""""" game but i was pleasantly surprised with an actually enjoyable game. only thing i can give feedback on is the feedback from what i assume is the devs voice. it got a little annoying after  15 minutes. But overall i really enjoyed this.
